title: santalum ellipticum
intro: Santalum ellipticum, also known as the Māmaki or New Zealand Māmaki, is a native plant species to New Zealand, belonging to the sandalwood family (Santalaceae). Its leaves have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, including improving liver function and reducing the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, Māmaki is often used as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
